positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition featuring an abstract celestial creature—a mix of glowing nebula dust and delicate mythological wings—floating above a minimalist, stylized mountain landscape at sunrise. The creature should have strong, contrasting bioluminescent accents (deep sapphire blues, electric purples) against warm, earthen tones (soft terracotta, cream). The aesthetic should be clean, vector-art inspired, suitable for screen printing, with sharp outlines and limited color palettes for maximum pop on fabric. Use negative space strategically to enhance the ethereal mood. Studio photography, vibrant gradients, high contrast, minimalist fantasy.
negative: blur, grainy, text, logo, watermark, signatures, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, low resolution, muddy colors, photographic, photorealistic, clutter, complex background, shadows, grunge
